heroSlides.title: Brij Darshan – 3 Day Spiritual Tour
heroSlides.subtitle: Sacred Pilgrimage Experience
heroSlides.description: A soulful journey through Mathura, Gokul, Barsana, Govardhan and Vrindavan — experiencing the divine land of Lord Krishna.

heroSlides.title: Experience the Divine Land
heroSlides.subtitle: Authentic Spiritual Journey
heroSlides.description: Walk in the footsteps of Lord Krishna, visit sacred temples, and immerse yourself in the rich cultural heritage of Brij Bhoomi.

heroSlides.title: Personalized Spiritual Experience
heroSlides.subtitle: Tailored for Your Soul
heroSlides.description: Customize your pilgrimage with expert guides, authentic cuisine, and premium accommodations.

items.name: Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi
items.desc: The sacred birthplace of Lord Krishna, one of the most important pilgrimage sites in India.

items.name: Dwarkadhish Temple
items.desc: A grand temple known for its intricate architecture and vibrant devotional atmosphere.

items.name: Raman Reti
items.desc: The holy sands where Lord Krishna spent his childhood with friends.

items.name: 84 Khamba
items.desc: A historic architectural structure supported by 84 stone pillars.

items.name: Brahmand Ghat
items.desc: The divine place where Krishna revealed the universe to Mother Yashoda.

items.name: Chintaharan Mahadev Temple
items.desc: A peaceful Mahadev Temple believed to remove worries and stress.

items.name: Nand Mahal
items.desc: The residence of Nanda Baba, foster father of Lord Krishna.

items.name: Radha Rani Temple
items.desc: A hilltop temple in Barsana dedicated to Shri Radha Rani.

items.name: Kirti Mandir
items.desc: The birthplace of Radha Rani’s mother, Kirti Maiya.

items.name: Gahvar Van
items.desc: A sacred forest where Radha and Krishna performed divine pastimes.

items.name: Govardhan Parikrama
items.desc: Sacred parikrama route.

items.name: Radha Kund
items.desc: Most sacred kund of Braj.

items.name: Dan Ghati Temple
items.desc: The main temple marking the beginning of Govardhan Parikrama.

items.name: Radha Kund & Shyam Kund
items.desc: The most sacred water ponds in the entire Braj region.

items.name: Jatipura
items.desc: A major stop during Govardhan Parikrama.

items.name: Poochhri Ka Lota
items.desc: A unique and spiritually significant rock formation.

items.name: Banke Bihari Temple
items.desc: The most famous temple of Vrindavan, known for its unique darshan style.

items.name: Radha Vallabh Temple
items.desc: A temple focusing on devotion to Shri Radha as supreme.

items.name: Nidhivan
items.desc: A mystical forest believed to host divine Raas Leela every night.

items.name: Radha Raman & Rangji Temple
items.desc: Ancient temples known for devotion and South Indian architecture.

items.name: Madan Mohan Temple
items.desc: A beautiful temple known for its serene surroundings.

items.name: Prem Mandir
items.desc: A beautifully illuminated marble temple symbolizing divine love.

items.name: ISKCON Temple
items.desc: Krishna-Balaram Mandir, a global center for devotion.

items.name: Chandrodaya Mandir
items.desc: Upcoming world’s tallest Krishna temple.

items.name: Shri Priyakant Ju Temple
items.desc: A peaceful lotus-shaped temple

heroSlides.title: Brij Darshan – 5 Day Spiritual Tour
heroSlides.subtitle: Complete Braj Bhoomi Experience
heroSlides.description: An extended spiritual journey with more time in Vrindavan and deeper exploration of Braj.

heroSlides.title: Walk the Sacred Land of Shri Krishna
heroSlides.subtitle: Braj Darshan at a Divine Pace
heroSlides.description: An immersive spiritual tour designed for devotion, reflection and inner peace.

items.name: Nand Bhawan
items.desc: The childhood home of Lord Krishna in Gokul.

items.name: Raman Reti
items.desc: Sacred sands where Krishna played with his friends.

items.name: Brahmand Ghat
items.desc: The place where Krishna revealed the universe to Yashoda.

items.name: 84 Khamba
items.desc: Historic structure supported by 84 stone pillars.

items.name: Chintaharan Mahadev
items.desc: Ancient Shiva temple believed to remove worries.

items.name: Rawal Village
items.desc: Believed birthplace of Shri Radha Rani.

items.name: Dwarkadhish Temple
items.desc: One of the most revered temples of Mathura.

items.name: Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi
items.desc: The sacred birthplace of Lord Krishna.

items.name: Vishram Ghat
items.desc: Holy Yamuna ghat where Krishna rested after victory over Kansa.

items.name: Birla Mandir
items.desc: Modern temple known for its peaceful surroundings.

items.name: Kans Qila
items.desc: Historic fort associated with King Kansa.

items.name: Maan Mandir
items.desc: Temple representing Radha Rani’s loving sulk (maan).

items.name: Radha Rani Mahal
items.desc: Hilltop shrine dedicated to Shri Radha Rani.

items.name: Kirti Mandir
items.desc: Birthplace of Kirti Maiya, mother of Radha Rani.

items.name: Gahvar Van
items.desc: Sacred forest of divine pastimes of Radha Krishna.

items.name: Nand Mahal
items.desc: Residence of Nanda Baba in Nandgaon.

items.name: Aasheshwar Mahadev
items.desc: Ancient Shiva temple worshipped by the residents of Braj.

items.name: Kadamb ter
items.desc: Sacred spot associated with Krishna’s pastimes.

items.name: Daan Ghati Temple
items.desc: Sacred site marking Krishna’s divine toll pastime.

items.name: Jatipura
items.desc: Major starting point of Govardhan Parikrama.

items.name: Talhati
items.desc: Base area of Govardhan Hill.

items.name: Poochhri Ka Lota
items.desc: Unique rock formation resembling a water pot.

items.name: Mansi Ganga
items.desc: Sacred water tank created by Krishna’s mind.

items.name: Kusum Sarovar
items.desc: Beautiful kund where Radha-Krishna met.

items.name: Radha Kund
items.desc: Most sacred kund dedicated to Shri Radha.

items.name: Shyam Kund
items.desc: Sacred kund associated with Lord Krishna.

items.name: Lalita Kund
items.desc: Kund dedicated to Lalita Sakhi.

items.name: Banke Bihari Temple
items.desc: Most famous temple of Vrindavan with unique darshan style.

items.name: Snehi Bihari Temple
items.desc: Temple dedicated to the loving form of Krishna.

items.name: Radha Vallabh Temple
items.desc: Temple focusing on devotion to Shri Radha.

items.name: Radha Raman Temple
items.desc: Ancient temple with self-manifested deity.

items.name: Madan Mohan Temple
items.desc: One of the oldest temples in Vrindavan.

items.name: Nidhivan
items.desc: Mystical forest believed to host divine Raas Leela.

items.name: Keshi Ghat
items.desc: Yamuna ghat where Krishna defeated demon Keshi.

items.name: Vanshi Vat
items.desc: Sacred banyan tree associated with Krishna’s flute.

items.name: Gopeshwar Mahadev
items.desc: Shiva temple guarding the Raas Leela.

items.name: Pagal Baba Temple
items.desc: Peaceful temple known for panoramic views.

items.name: Prem Mandir
items.desc: Magnificent marble temple symbolizing divine love.

items.name: ISKCON Temple
items.desc: Krishna-Balaram Mandir and global spiritual center.

items.name: Chandrodaya Mandir
items.desc: Upcoming tallest Krishna temple in the world.

items.name: Jaipur Temple
items.desc: Red sandstone temple built by the Jaipur royal family.

items.name: Rangji Temple
items.desc: South Indian style temple dedicated to Lord Ranganatha.

items.name: Dauji Temple
items.desc: Ancient temple dedicated to Lord Balaram.

items.name: Bhandir Van
items.desc: Sacred forest where Lord Krishna and Radha performed divine pastimes.

items.name: Ram Taal
items.desc: Holy pond associated with Lord Balaram, known for its spiritual significance.

items.name: Garud Dev Ji Temple
items.desc: Temple dedicated to Garud Dev, the divine vehicle of Lord Vishnu.

items.name: Taj Mahal
items.desc: World-famous marble monument and symbol of love.

items.name: Agra Fort
items.desc: Historic Mughal fort and UNESCO World Heritage Site.
